methods.description: Process for measuring fossil specimens using digital sliding calipers and evaluating damage using CT images.

steps.description: A digital sliding caliper was used to take linear measurements to a tenth of millimeter.
steps.searchable_summary: use digital sliding caliper to measure specimens

steps.description: Damage was evaluated from computed tomography (CT) images captured with a CT scanner with a resolution of 0.1 mm.
steps.searchable_summary: evaluate specimen damage using CT images

methods.description: Surface scanning of original fossil specimens for visual comparison and virtual restoration.

steps.description: Some original fossil specimens were surface-scanned with a NextEngine 3D scanner using the Macro and HD settings.
steps.searchable_summary: perform surface scanning of specimens using 3D scanner
